title: Flies Faster Than a Bullet
summary: You can fly, and you’re superstrong, hard to hurt, and fast too. Is there anything you can’t do?
tiers: Tier 3: Hidden Reserves or See Through Matter
Tier 6: Burning Light or Ignore Affliction
gm_intrusions: A nemesis finds the character. A strange material is found to nullify the character’s abilities.
text: You can fly, and you’re superstrong, hard to hurt, and fast too. Is there anything you can’t do?
